scenario: You are designing a canvas app for a retail organization. You need to make sure that only the Global administrator is able to login to the app. The Global admin should also be able to manage (create/update/delete) the users in Microsoft Entra.
q: Which of the following two components should you use to implement the requirement?
why: Managing (create/update/delete) users in Microsoft Entra ID is done through the Microsoft Graph API. Because a canvas app cannot call Graph directly, you expose the Graph calls through a Custom connector (which acts as a wrapper/middleware around the API) and call it from the app. The Dataverse Web API works with Dataverse data (not Entra users), and Azure Logic Apps is an integration/orchestration service that is not needed here.
